questionHtml: Outline the roles of Rhizobium bacteria in the nitrogen cycle.
markschemeHtml:
a. «Rhizobium» forms mutualistic/symbiotic relationship with roots/legumes ✔

b. «Rhizobium» fixes «atmospheric» nitrogen ✔

c. converts it into ammonia «to be used by plants» ✔

meta.title: Outline the roles of Rhizobium bacteria in the nitrogen cycle.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Additional higher level topics)
